title: Quackems Game Addon
description: It adds numerous armour, blocks, tools, and worlds to explore. The only limit is your imagination!
body:
# ⚔️The Mod
This mod includes many different additions to the game, varying from tools and armour, to dimensions and biomes, and even different ores! It is required on both the server and client in order to work, and is great for multiplayer experiences as decorative blocks are also included in this modification. All versions before version 1.0 are Beta or Alpha so **DO NOT** take them as the full version, expect bugs and uncomplete sectors of the mod.

# 🐛How to Report Issues
If you incounter any issues make sure you head to the [issue tracker](https://github.com/Quackems/Quackems-Minecraft-End-Update/issues) to report any bugs, crashes, or any other issues or the [discord](https://www.discord.gg/FmnUtkqtvb), make sure to include information about the other mods you are using, and provide any crash logs/files you may have.

# ❓Frequently Asked Questions
We have a wiki which includes some frequently asked questions [here](https://github.com/Quackems/Quackems-Minecraft-End-Update/wiki/FAQ), more likely than not, your question already has an answer.

# ⚙️What we plan in the future.
Here is a list of what are top priorities are, this list is subject to change.

     - Add new biomes
    
     - Add new dimensions
     
     - Add even more tools and armour sets


# Extra
**This mod was made with the help of Kaupen tutorials**.

_**I accept no liability on the mod's affect on your world**!_

**This mod uses an MIT liscence**.

Everyone is more than welcome to create addons and look at the source code of the mod. BUT
> **NO BODY IS ENTITLED TO COPY CODE FROM THE MOD, BUT IT MAY BE USED AS A REFERENCE**.
